ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each asset (e.g., bitcoin, ethereum) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the asset (e.g., btc, eth) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, token) */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data associated with the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the asset */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or logo of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset held in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset associated with the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset within a given time period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset within a given time period */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the asset within a given time period */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the asset being transacted */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset being transacted */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the transaction (including fee) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
